_meta.description: Regression test suite manifest for parallel orchestration with module-aligned directories under Frontend/Backend layers
_meta.csvFormat: Enriched Agent-Native CSV (ID, Title, Section, Priority, Business_Rule, Edge_Case_Refs, Preconditions, Test_Data, Steps, Assertions, Cross_Layer_Checks, Failure_Signals, Cleanup, References, Automation_Status)

suites.name: Payment CyberSource
suites.browserRequirementReason: CyberSource Microform v2 uses cross-origin iframes (testflex.cybersource.com) that Firefox MCP cannot access via accessibility tree. Chromium CDP required.

suites.name: Payment - Datatrans
suites.notes: Datatrans is the only redirect processor. Redirect to /checkout/payment is the DESIGNED flow — never mark cases BLOCKED on the redirect.

suites.name: Payment Cross-Cutting
suites.browserRequirementReason: Includes PCI compliance checks against CyberSource Microform iframe; Firefox MCP cannot access cross-origin iframe DOM.

suites.name: Layout Stability
suites.browserRequirementReason: PerformanceObserver layout-shift entries + getBoundingClientRect measurements work most reliably in Chromium; uses scripts/lib/measure-layout.ts snippets via browser_evaluate. Selectors verified live against vcst-qa B2B-store (see .claude/agents/knowledge/storefront-selectors.md). Scope (8 components, 9 pages) enforced by .claude/agents/knowledge/critical-ui-scope.md and npm run scope:validate.

suites.name: GraphQL xCart — Shipment, Payment, Merge, Remove
GraphQL xCart — Per-RuleSet Validation & Line-Item Validity

selections._doc: Source of truth for `selections` below. Run `npm run suites:sync` to regenerate `selections` after edits. Rule shapes: { include: [...] } | { all: true, exclude?: [...] } | { where: {domain|layer|concern|priority|tag|tagAny}, include?: [...], exclude?: [...] }.
